The '''Junior Jedi Academy''' was a division of the [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] [[Jedi Praxeum|Praxeum]] specifically for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]].<ref name="Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe" />

In order to house them, some of the Academy rooms were modified into small bedrooms with attached [[Refresher/Legends|refresher units]]. A quite structured program was devised for the students, including provisions such as two hours of free time after dinner and all students needing to be in bed four hours after nightfall. [[Tionne Solusar]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] undertook most of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training, although they were joined by [[Ikrit]] later on.<ref name="Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe" />

The initial class was twenty diverse students of different species. [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Chitter]] were some of the first students. [[Uldir Lochett]] and [[Sannah]] also joined midway through.<ref name="Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe" />
